title: Twilight Forest Forms [Cobblemon]
description: Mod that integrates Cobblemon with the Twilight Forest dimension. Adds 50+ custom fakemon, as well as progression-based spawning suited to each structure and biome.
body:
Cobblemon datapack that adds 50+ custom forms and over 200 spawns for the Twilight Forest mod. Custom forms have their own custom models, animations, typing, movesets, loot tables, and more! 

Requires the mod [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) to work. 

Integration with the [Cobblemon: Shadowed Hearts](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-shadowedhearts) (Optional) 

Link to documentation: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1AafuQTbn8ZOYbnxcc8pOjfavEZGB1dysjJn2TxD4Bww

<details>
<summary>Forms added in v4.0:</summary>

- Zubat and Golbat (Ice / Flying)
- Crobat (Ice / Dark)
- Darumaka line (Ice, Unovan/Galarian hybrid)
- Honedge (Grass/Ghost)
- Doublade (Ice/Ghost)
- Aegislash (Fire/Steel)
- Shellos and Gastrodon (Fire / Ground)
- Hatenna line (Ice / Psychic)
  
![Twilight Hatterene Mount ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97505fe0209dd8b33464757f8cf9d54b483e5242_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Forms added in v3.0:</summary>

- Tangela & Tangrowth (Grass / Steel)
- Drifloon & Drifblim (Ghost / Fire)
- Pinsir (Bug / Dark)
- Heracross (Bug / Fire)
- Deino, Zweilous, Hydreigon (Dragon / Fire)
- Twilight Vivillon Pattern
  
![Twilight Deino, Zweilous, and Hydreigon with the Hydra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb40da7731e71103f0a408f725fca389a99397c.jpeg)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Forms added in v2.0:</summary>
  
- Cubone & Marowak (Grass / Ghost)
- Necromarrow (Marowak evo, Psychic / Ghost)
- Aron, Lairon, Aggron (Grass / Steel)
- Nickit & Thievul (Ghost/Dark)
- Fidough & Dachsbun (Ghost/Normal)

![Necromarrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a202df19d497d853d7b49fd6eb8a828e71efe4b.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Forms added in v1.0:</summary>
  
- Torterra (Canopy, Twilight Oak, Fireswamp, and Darkwood)
- Ekans & Arbok (Poison/Steel)
- Paras & Parasect (Bug/Poison w/ Water Bubble)
- Ralts, Kirlia, Gallade, and Gardevoir (Ghost/Fight and Ghost/Fairy)
- Tropius (Grass/Dragon)
- Venipede, Whirlipede, Scolipede (Psychic/Dark)
- Dwebble & Crustle (Underbrick & Mazestone)
- Deerling & Sawsbuck (Grass/Psychic)
- Golett & Golurk (Grass/Electric)
- Wooloo & Dubwool (Fairy/Fight)

![Twilight Venipede, Whirlipede, and Scolipede](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81cdf607e9bae0f09b93470d4435395405cce4cc.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Custom loot tables:</summary>
  
- Nincada line (drops cicada)
- Murkrow (drops raven feather for magic map)
- Pachirisu (drops torch berries) 
- Volbeat & Illumise (chance to drop Moonworm queen) 
- Sableye (chance to drop Charm of Keeping) 
- Misdreavus (drops red threads, helps with labyrinth) 
- Alolan Ninetales (chance to drop arctic fur) 
- and more! 

![Alolan Vulpix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0962d7ae7a1ba547ab8fe03b319a0b44f695991d.png)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Misc. Features</summary>
  
- Adds custom evolution to Marowak, Necromarrow!
- Use transformation powder to convert Twilight forms to vanilla (and vice versa)
- Adds custom presets to add your own spawns to the Twilight Forest
- Regional Pokédex to track your progress for all available spawns in the dimension
- Integration with JayemCeekay's Shadowed Hearts mod for shadow Pokémon spawns and purification system (similar to Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness)
- Adds new typing, abilities, and movesets for Mooshtank (red & brown are different!) 

![Shadowed-Hearts-Purification-Shrine-Twilight-Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea39714d4e5bbf1076c8369f27383502e37a63bf_0.webp)

</details>




Discord addon link: [https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1243007129250566175](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1243007129250566175)

For suggestions, teasers, and polls, check out this discord thread: [https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1195373518095921233](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1195373518095921233)


Github repo: [https://github.com/kingtrapinch/Twilight-Forms](https://github.com/kingtrapinch/Twilight-Forms)

To report bugs or suggest improvements, visit the github repo's issue page: [https://github.com/kingtrapinch/Twilight-Forms/issues](https://github.com/kingtrapinch/Twilight-Forms/issues)

![Twilight Gardevoir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0304cc982da494ab22e0ad884ecc537c4f94571d.png)
